name: Karat by Lollicup
message: Karat® by Lollicup is a rapidly-growing manufacturer and distributor of environmentally friendly, single-use disposable products, primarily used in restaurants and food service settings. The company supplies a wide range of products for national restaurant chains, as well as smaller, regional chains. Karats products include food packaging, containers, tableware, cups, lids, cutlery and straws. The company also provides additional environmentally friendly options to sustainably-conscious customers.
